No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). Its focus on Chinese characters, history, and culture fosters appreciation of cultural diversity and its contribution to sustainable development (Target 4.7).
evidence: 本課程為中文系必修課程
引申中國文化及歷史相關知識
能瞭解中國文字的性質與特色

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to economic growth, employment, or labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities of any kind.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course directly contributes to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4) by introducing and exploring the history and evolution of ancient Chinese scripts like oracle bone and bronze inscriptions.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable consumption or production patterns.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change mitigation or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: While the course mentions the historical 'unification of Chinese characters,' this is a descriptive historical topic, not a direct contribution to building modern effective institutions or promoting rule of law as envisioned by SDG 16. The link is too indirect and weak.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to global partnerships or means of implementation.
